customer_addr:
190 E Market St
La Rue, OH 43332

citations.narrative:
Water receptacles are not being kept clean and sanitary. Approximately six water bottles that provide water access for
approximately six individual chinchilla enclosures contained a green substance adhered to the inside. At the bottom of the
water bottles there was sediment, but the water itself was clear. Insufficient cleaning of water receptables can lead to
disease and illness for the regulated animals. Correct by ensuring all water receptacles are kept clean and sanitary.
Correct by 14-APR-2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the Licensee.
n
